title: eurya coriacea
intro: Eurya coriacea, also known as the white corkwood or white coralberry, is a plant species belonging to the Euryaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain and swelling, and treating respiratory issues like bronchitis and coughs. In traditional herbal preparations, Eurya coriacea is often used in infusions or decoctions, and can also be made into a paste or ointment to be applied topically.
